title: bromus berteroanus var. excelsus
intro: Bromus berteroanus var. excelsus is a lesser-known species of the wild ryegrass plant, belonging to the grass family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bromus berteroanus var. excelsus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
